Class SeatingConfigurationImpl

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.boxoffice.SeatingConfigurationImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
SeatingConfiguration
public class SeatingConfigurationImpl extends Object implements SeatingConfiguration
Implementation of seating configuration management. Reviews and manages restricted view seats and accessibility requirements. Base seating configuration is managed by operations teams, this implementation focuses on restricted view and accessibility reviews. Data stored: - restrictedSeats: Maps seat number to restricted view status - accessibilityRequirements: Maps seat number to accessibility requirements

      public void reviewAccessibility(int seatNumber, String requirements)
      Reviews and records accessibility requirements for seats

      Parameters:
      seatNumber - Number of the seat to be reviewed
      requirements - Specific accessibility requirements for the seat
